name: agent-studio
description: Visual orchestration workspace for Ruflo (Claude Flow) multi-agent swarms

scripts.dev: concurrently -n bridge,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @agent-studio/event-bridge" "npm run dev -w @agent-studio/studio-ui"
scripts.mock: concurrently -n bridge,mock -c cyan,yellow --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev -w @agent-studio/event-bridge" "sleep 1 && tsx scripts/mock-events.ts"
scripts.build: tsc --build && npm run typecheck -w @agent-studio/studio-ui && npm run typecheck -w @agent-studio/desktop-overlay && npm run typecheck -w @agent-studio/electron-shell && npm run build -w @agent-studio/studio-ui && npm run build -w @agent-studio/desktop-overlay && npm run build -w @agent-studio/electron-shell
